title: FOCUS ON: Illegal dumping is everybody's problem
description: GEORGE NEWS - Illegal dumping is a scourge...
bodyText:
[{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Dumped waste often contains poison, old medicine, broken glass and other dangerous things that children and animals are mostly likely to come across."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Illegal dumping is a scourge in many George informal living areas. Not only do illegal dump sites pose health threats for those living close by, but they also look ugly and mar the landscape.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Illegal dumping is a scourge in many George informal living areas. Not only do illegal dump sites pose health threats for those living close by, but they also look ugly and mar the landscape."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"George Municipality is continuously fighting a war against illegal dumping, spending millions of rands a year to clean them up."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The municipality requests the communities to be aware of the problem and to not contribute to illegal dumping themselves.","html":"The municipality requests the communities to be aware of the problem and to not contribute to illegal dumping themselves."},{"type":"heading","text":"What is illegal dumping?","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Illegal dumping is anything you throw away in a place where it does not belong.","html":"Illegal dumping is anything you throw away in a place where it does not belong."},{"type":"heading","text":"Illegal dumping is everybody’s problem","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you throw your junk just anywhere, it will eventually become your problem some way or another.","html":"If you throw your junk just anywhere, it will eventually become your problem some way or another."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It can make you sick or kill you.","html":"It can make you sick or kill you."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dumped waste often contains poison, old medicine, broken glass and other dangerous things that children and animals are mostly likely to come across.Junk that lies in the sun develops poisonous gasses or bacteria that can cause diseases and infections and make you very ill or even kill you.Dumpsites attract snakes and scorpions that can bite or sting you, and rats and insects that carry dangerous diseases.Junk inside or near rivers and wetlands releases bad stuff into the water that can make people downstream so sick they can die of dehydration and fever.","html":"
  • Dumped waste often contains poison, old medicine, broken glass and other dangerous things that children and animals are mostly likely to come across.
  • Junk that lies in the sun develops poisonous gasses or bacteria that can cause diseases and infections and make you very ill or even kill you.
  • Dumpsites attract snakes and scorpions that can bite or sting you, and rats and insects that carry dangerous diseases.
  • Junk inside or near rivers and wetlands releases bad stuff into the water that can make people downstream so sick they can die of dehydration and fever.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It can cause fires","html":"It can cause fires"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Layers of rubble lying in the sun can get so hot it can catch fire and spread to houses. Smoke and fumes from refuse fires can be harmful or even deadly.","html":"
  • Layers of rubble lying in the sun can get so hot it can catch fire and spread to houses. Smoke and fumes from refuse fires can be harmful or even deadly.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It can stink the place up","html":"It can stink the place up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Throwing stuff into sewerage drains, or flushing the wrong stuff down the toilet, will clog pipes and the sewage will overflow into your neighbourhood.","html":"
  • Throwing stuff into sewerage drains, or flushing the wrong stuff down the toilet, will clog pipes and the sewage will overflow into your neighbourhood.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It can flood you out","html":"It can flood you out"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Throwing junk into storm water drains will clog up the pipes and water will overflow onto your streets and property.","html":"
  • Throwing junk into storm water drains will clog up the pipes and water will overflow onto your streets and property.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Illegal dumping wastes money","html":"Illegal dumping wastes money"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Money that could have been used for your community is being wasted cleaning up illegal dumping sites.","html":"
  • Money that could have been used for your community is being wasted cleaning up illegal dumping sites.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dumping sites bring your property value down","html":"Dumping sites bring your property value down"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you own property near a dumping site it will bring down its value and you will find it more difficult to sell it.","html":"
  • If you own property near a dumping site it will bring down its value and you will find it more difficult to sell it.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can go to prison","html":"You can go to prison"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you get caught dumping or littering, you will be fined. If you can’t pay the fine, you can go to prison. Measures to catch illegal dumping at night, such as hidden cameras, are being considered.","html":"
  • If you get caught dumping or littering, you will be fined. If you can’t pay the fine, you can go to prison. Measures to catch illegal dumping at night, such as hidden cameras, are being considered.
    • "},{"type":"heading","text":"You can make a difference","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Don’t litter","html":"Don’t litter"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keep your food papers, cigarette butts and other waste with you until you get to a refuse bin or home, and throw it away in a bin.","html":"
  • Keep your food papers, cigarette butts and other waste with you until you get to a refuse bin or home, and throw it away in a bin.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keep your rubbish at home until pick-up day","html":"Keep your rubbish at home until pick-up day"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Refuse is picked up in your neighbourhood once a week (see schedule below). Please put your waste inside refuse bags and keep at your house until collection day.Put garden waste in green bags so it can be collected separately and composted.Put refuse bags on the sidewalk outside your house by 07:30 on collection day.To protect your bags from being torn open overnight, please don’t put them out the night before.","html":"
  • Refuse is picked up in your neighbourhood once a week (see schedule below). Please put your waste inside refuse bags and keep at your house until collection day.
  • Put garden waste in green bags so it can be collected separately and composted.
  • Put refuse bags on the sidewalk outside your house by 07:30 on collection day.
  • To protect your bags from being torn open overnight, please don’t put them out the night before.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Find your collection spot","html":"Find your collection spot"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you live in an area where large refuse trucks can’t get to your house, find out from your councillor or community where your closest drop-off spot is. Bakkies drive into these areas and collect from drop-off spots on collection day.If there isn’t a drop-off spot within quick walking distance, please ask your councillor to request Environmental Services to arrange for a site near you.","html":"
  • If you live in an area where large refuse trucks can’t get to your house, find out from your councillor or community where your closest drop-off spot is. Bakkies drive into these areas and collect from drop-off spots on collection day.
  • If there isn’t a drop-off spot within quick walking distance, please ask your councillor to request Environmental Services to arrange for a site near you.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Close it up","html":"Close it up"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Try to close up your full refuse bags inside something solid with a lid, such as a strong cardboard box, wooden box or brick structure, to keep bad smells in and animals out.","html":"
  • Try to close up your full refuse bags inside something solid with a lid, such as a strong cardboard box, wooden box or brick structure, to keep bad smells in and animals out.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Deal with the big stuff","html":"Deal with the big stuff"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Building rubble and items that cannot fit inside a black bag must go to the municipal refuse site on the R102 (airport road). Make a plan with friends or neighbours to load your big stuff together to go drop off in one trip.","html":"
  • Building rubble and items that cannot fit inside a black bag must go to the municipal refuse site on the R102 (airport road). Make a plan with friends or neighbours to load your big stuff together to go drop off in one trip.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dead animals","html":"Dead animals"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Please do not put dead animals out with your bags or dump them somewhere else.The Garden Route SPCA will collect and dispose for a fee. Phone 044 878 1990.Report dead animals on the N2 to Sanral on 082 553 4878.","html":"
  • Please do not put dead animals out with your bags or dump them somewhere else.
  • The Garden Route SPCA will collect and dispose for a fee. Phone 044 878 1990.
  • Report dead animals on the N2 to Sanral on 082 553 4878.
    • "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Report illegal dumping","html":"Report illegal dumping"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you know who is dumping illegally, report them to 044 801 6350 or [email protected] or 044 801 6300 (a/h).Information that will help the case for a warning or fine: car description and/or registration number, address of alleged perpetrator, type of waste and address of where it was dumped. A cellphone photo of dumping in action will help but is not essential.Report dumped waste for collection on 044 802 2900 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).","html":"
  • If you know who is dumping illegally, report them to 044 801 6350 or [email protected] or 044 801 6300 (a/h).
  • Information that will help the case for a warning or fine: car description and/or registration number, address of alleged perpetrator, type of waste and address of where it was dumped. A cellphone photo of dumping in action will help but is not essential.
  • Report dumped waste for collection on 044 802 2900 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).
    • "},{"type":"heading","text":"Refuse removal days","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Monday: Blanco, Riverlea, Heather Park, Heatherlands, Glen Barrie, Kraaibosch, Groenkloof, Blue Mountain Village, Herold’s Bay, Victoria Bay, Rondevlei area (George side)Tuesday: Le Vallia, Rosemoor, Conville, Protea Park, Parkdene, Ballotsview, Borcherds, Lawaaikamp, Thembalethu, Wilderness, Constantia Kloof, KleinkrantzWednesday: Camphersdrift, Fernridge, Denneoord, Bo-dorp, Blommekloof, Tweerivieren, Hoogekraal, Hoekwil, Touwsranten farm areasThursday: Wilderness Heights, Dormehlsdrift, George South, Le Grand, Bos en Dal, Groeneweidepark, Sinksabrug, Herold, Geelhoutboom, Eselsjacht, Hansmoeskraal, Jonkershoek, Rooirivierrif, Pacaltsdorp, Rosedale, Waboomskraal, Touwsranten villageFriday: Glenwood, Loerie Park, Eden George, Genevafontein, Denver Park, Bergsig, Eastern ExtensionBusinesses: Monday, Wednesday and Friday","html":"
  • Monday: Blanco, Riverlea, Heather Park, Heatherlands, Glen Barrie, Kraaibosch, Groenkloof, Blue Mountain Village, Herold’s Bay, Victoria Bay, Rondevlei area (George side)
  • Tuesday: Le Vallia, Rosemoor, Conville, Protea Park, Parkdene, Ballotsview, Borcherds, Lawaaikamp,
  • Thembalethu, Wilderness, Constantia Kloof, Kleinkrantz
    Wednesday: Camphersdrift, Fernridge, Denneoord, Bo-dorp, Blommekloof, Tweerivieren, Hoogekraal, Hoekwil, Touwsranten farm areas
  • Thursday: Wilderness Heights, Dormehlsdrift, George South, Le Grand, Bos en Dal, Groeneweidepark, Sinksabrug, Herold, Geelhoutboom, Eselsjacht, Hansmoeskraal, Jonkershoek, Rooirivierrif, Pacaltsdorp, Rosedale, Waboomskraal, Touwsranten village
  • Friday: Glenwood, Loerie Park, Eden George, Genevafontein, Denver Park, Bergsig, Eastern Extension
  • Businesses: Monday, Wednesday and Friday
    • "},{"type":"heading","text":"Quick numbers","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Report people who illegally dump to Law Enforcement: 044 801 6350 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).Report illegally dumped waste for collection to Environmental Services: 044 802 2900 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).Report dead animals for collection to SPCA: 044 878 1990Report dead animals on the N2 for collection to Sanral: 082 553 4878.","html":"
  • Report people who illegally dump to Law Enforcement: 044 801 6350 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).
  • Report illegally dumped waste for collection to Environmental Services: 044 802 2900 or 044 801 6300 (a/h).
  • Report dead animals for collection to SPCA: 044 878 1990
  • Report dead animals on the N2 for collection to Sanral: 082 553 4878.
    • "}]

images.alt: FOCUS ON: Illegal dumping is everybody's problem

teaser: Dumped waste often contains poison, old medicine, broken glass and other dangerous things that children and animals are mostly likely to come across.
featuredCaption: Photo for illustration purposes only. Image: Pexels
